texto: I tend not to wear accessories. I'm not one of those gals with a drawerful of amazing jewelry. I don't even have my ears pierced! But I have one bracelet that never comes off my wrist.
explicacao: Citação de Rachael Taylor sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “I tend not to wear accessories. I'm not one of those gals with a drawerful of amazing jewelry. I …” articula reflexao, jewelry, never em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e never.

frase_original: I tend not to wear accessories. I'm not one of those gals with a drawerful of amazing jewelry. I don't even have my ears pierced! But I have one bracelet that never comes off my wrist.

texto: Falling in love, romance, matters of the heart - when you fall in love, on some biochemical level you know there is a chance it won't work out. It's ingrained in us that if you take such an enormous risk on someone with your heart that it might not pay off. I gamble all my chips and I might actually lose everything.
explicacao: Citação de Rachael Taylor sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Falling in love, romance, matters of the heart - when you fall in love, on some biochemical level…” articula amor, love, work em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como dia-chuvoso e trabalho.

It's ingrained in us that if you take such an enormous risk on someone with your heart that it might not pay off. I gamble all my chips and I might actually lose everything.

texto: The earth is such a voluminous, sparse, wild place that has its own rhythm that human beings try to control and strategize our way around, but the truth is, if you're out someplace like the ocean on a capsized boat, it doesn't matter if you have academic degrees, or if you're a martial-arts ninja. Nature is a bigger force than you.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Rachael Taylor: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “The earth is such a voluminous, sparse, wild place that has its own rhythm that human beings try …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, verdade, ocean pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de ocean e boat.
